examples: A group of men are erecting a monstrous copper edifice.
All were detained in the Salem Gaol, a grim edifice of granite blocks, iron-barred windows and brick-walled cells.
Evidence such as this serves to undermine the apparently monolithic edifice of Victorianism.
CRU's importance has always lain in the foundations it puts under the edifice of climate science.
Clinton called the United States "uniquely well-positioned" to help construct that metaphorical global edifice.
